codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 package for `e9b4f6fc` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e9b4f6fc/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e9b4f6fc/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e9b4f6fc/generator.py#L111). The rule is: find the largest non-black connected rectangle, crop it, then apply each isolated horizontal 2-cell legend pair as a color substitution from the right cell’s color to the left cell’s color. The summary hint was used, not discarded; it matched the official examples, and no new primitive was needed.

The generator stays close to the task family: fixed `13x13` inputs, one filled rectangular component, 2-3 connected interior source-color motifs, and 2-3 isolated horizontal legend pairs placed away from the rectangle. Official verification passed `5/5`, generated verification passed `1000/1000`, and I visually checked the previews. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e9b4f6fc/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e9b4f6fc/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e9b4f6fc/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e9b4f6fc/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e9b4f6fc/previews/preview_03.png).
